title: A Murder in Oakland: Beauty Is Deadly
original_title: A Murder in Oakland: Beauty is Deadly
overview: A four-year-old cold case has been reopened in Oakland with new evidence, uncovering a dangerous web of crime, deception, and corruption. This thrilling mystery follows the relentless pursuit of justice as detectives dig deeper into a case that was thought to be long buried.
